title: Add async-load option to prep, proc, proc_dff and verific
body:
This adds code from #3031 but leaves old code as well. 

Code in line : https://github.com/YosysHQ/yosys/compare/micko/async-load?expand=1#diff-b8fc5a9979d976848637881b40cdd6a2b28d031f270fb775eadfbbe3b4454e54R197 is a bit ugly but easier to revert in future then multi line expression.

Regarding Verific there is no more need for compile option to override value so that is reverted.

Test example 
```
module test (input clk, rstn, input [3:0] val, output reg [3:0] cnt);
        always @ (posedge clk or negedge rstn) begin
                if (~rstn)
                        cnt <= val;
                else
                        cnt <= cnt + 1;
        end
endmodule
```

cmd line:
```
yosys -q -p 'read_verilog -sv test.v; prep -top test -async-load; write_rtlil; write_verilog'
```

verific:
```
yosys -q -p 'verific -async-load; read -sv test.v; prep -top test; write_rtlil; write_verilog'
```
code_blocks: yosys -q -p 'read_verilog -sv test.v; prep -top test -async-load; write_rtlil; write_verilog'
yosys -q -p 'verific -async-load; read -sv test.v; prep -top test; write_rtlil; write_verilog'
